title: Omni Triplets Into-Fire Datapack
description: An Omnitrix datapack based on the youtube series of the same name
body:
The Omni-Triplets datapack received a code rewrite and update, including compatibility for s2. (WARNING: if you are using both together, please sort the OT Action resource pack above the s1 resource pack, otherwise models will not render properly.)

#
Video Showcasing the changes in this update<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UGsDkUC1NdU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
#


Omni Triplets: Into-Fire is a companion datapack to the series of the same name, with a slight focus on multiplayer. Play as multiple characters from the series, fight bosses, and use alien powers in combat!

Season 1 Version 5.0 includes:

--Cursed Gax, easily the most powerful Curse form...
--A New Vilgax boss fight, he can be summoned by turning into Gax 3 times or by throwing down a soul lantern, nether star and of course a redstone torch together.

-Fully-Functioning Cursed Aliens! - As Todd if you take enough damage, you will unlock the ability to transform into powerful combat-focused variants of your abilities, now it works with each alien, not just a few.
--The syringe item (redstone torch, 3 glass, and an iron ingot.), can be used to transfer or remove the curse. if you transfer it to George he will transform into his cursed form, but it will be removed once a Todd player gets too close, transferring it back to the Todd player.

---Unstable mode: If you use the Curse 8 times, or take the curse back from a George player, you will be locked in unstable mode, only able to become Cursed aliens. If you use the syringe in this mode, the curse will no longer be accessible.
--Healthbars for bosses

--A new ending function that tallies up a few stats from your playthrough, accessed by defeating Vilgax.
--All text has been made translatable for both seasons, no other language files exist yet, though.
--A Fire status effect has been added, inspired by the OT Action datapack, it affects players as well as mobs.
--An entirely separate control scheme inspired by OT Action's controls.
--Fixed bugs
--A few lore documents
-Other necromorphs can be summoned by crafting:

Rat Queen (redstone torch, 5 leather, blaze rod)
Dream-Marrow (redstone torch, 22 bones)
Seer (redstone torch, 2 ender pearls, copper ingot)
Emir (redstone torch, 3 obsidian, amethyst shard)

Bosses:
George (redstone torch, paper, emerald)
Zach (redstone torch, iron block, netherite ingot)

To Craft items, throw these items on the ground, along with an RT (Redstone Torch) to activate crafting.

Omnitrix beacon - emerald, 2 iron ingots
Ice Katana - diamond sword on an ice block
Tactical Striker - iron ingot, and blaze rod together
Earth Spear - trident, 5 cobblestone together
Gust Axe - Iron block, Iron axe, purple stained glass together

Extra functions
/function otif:settings_menu
/function otif:uninstall
